en.description_en: The Yakushi Kofun, an ancient burial mound. Municipally designated as a monument (historic site) by Chikusei City on 1977-03-24. Located in the Kō area.

items.name: 下館藩主石川総管の墓
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_romaji: Shimodate Hanshu Ishikawa Fusakan no Haka
en.name_en: Grave of Ishikawa Fusakan, lord of Shimodate domain
en.description_en: The grave of Ishikawa Fusakan, a lord of the Shimodate domain. Municipally designated as a monument (historic site) by Chikusei City on 1977-03-24. Located in the Nakadate area.

items.name: 富士東古墳（浅間山）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: The Fujihigashi Kofun, also called Sengenyama, an ancient burial mound. Municipally designated as a monument (historic site) by Chikusei City on 1977-03-24. Located in the Nakadate area.

items.name: 富士東古墳（寺うしろ山）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: The Fujihigashi Kofun, also called Tera-ushiroyama, an ancient burial mound. Municipally designated as a monument (historic site) by Chikusei City on 1977-03-24. Located in the Nakadate area.

items.name: 佐藤英信の墓
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: The grave of Satō Hidenobu. Municipally designated as a monument (historic site) by Chikusei City on 1977-03-24. Located in the Okazeri area.

items.name: 台畑古墳
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: The Daibatake Kofun, an ancient burial mound. Municipally designated as a monument (historic site) by Chikusei City on 1985-12-24. Located in the Murata area.

items.name: 飯田軍蔵の墓所
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: The grave site of Iida Gunzō. Municipally designated as a monument (historic site) by Chikusei City on 2000-07-25. Located in the Kido area.

items.name: 観音寺　大欅
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A great keyaki (Japanese zelkova) tree at Kannon-ji temple. Municipally designated as a monument (natural monument) by Chikusei City on 1977-03-24. Located in the Nakadate area.

items.name: 薬師堂　大欅
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Great zelkova of the Yakushi Hall
en.description_en: A great keyaki (Japanese zelkova) tree at the Yakushi Hall. Municipally designated as a monument (natural monument) by Chikusei City on 1977-03-24. Located in the Kō area.

items.name: 関本神社の欅
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A keyaki (Japanese zelkova) tree at Sekimoto Shrine. Municipally designated as a monument (natural monument) by Chikusei City on 1979-10-01. Located in the Sekimotokami area.

items.name: 月海山観喜院医王寺（廃寺）藪椿
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Camellia of the former Iō-ji temple (Kanki-in, Gekkaizan)
en.description_en: A yabutsubaki (common camellia) associated with the defunct Iō-ji temple (Kanki-in, Gekkaizan). Municipally designated as a monument (natural monument) by Chikusei City on 1993-10-21. Located in the Okazeri area.

items.name: 市野辺大柳
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A great yanagi (willow) tree at Ichinobe. Municipally designated as a monument (natural monument) by Chikusei City on 1999-03-24. Located in the Ichinobe area.
